description_long: This object is a mature coconut with a rough, fibrous brown husk covering its entire surface. The exterior displays a mix of dark and medium brown tones, with irregular, wavy striations and subtle ridges running along its length. The surface is uneven and slightly glossy in some areas, suggesting a hard, woody shell beneath the fibrous layer. One end of the coconut features a small, dark, recessed opening, likely the stem scar, while the rest of the body is rounded and slightly asymmetrical. The coconut's overall shape is ovoid, tapering slightly toward the stem end, and the texture is visually coarse with dense, interwoven fibers. No other objects or environmental context are visible around the coconut.
description: A rough, brown, fibrous coconut with a hard, glossy shell and a small stem scar at one end. The surface is uneven, with dense, wavy striations and a natural, ovoid shape.
description_view_0: The coconut is seen from a side angle, highlighting its rough, fibrous texture and slightly asymmetrical, rounded shape.
description_view_1: This view shows the coconut from a more top-down perspective, emphasizing its overall roundness and the glossy highlights on the surface.
description_view_2: The coconut is viewed from another side, displaying a smoother area of the husk with less pronounced striations and a more uniform brown color.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the end with the stem scar, showing a lighter, more textured area with a small, dark, recessed opening.
attribute_husk_pattern: The husk displays a dense, irregular pattern of wavy, interwoven fibers running mostly lengthwise along the coconut. The surface is marked by subtle ridges and grooves, with some areas appearing smoother and others more deeply textured. There are variations in fiber density, with some patches showing tighter, more compact fibers and others more open, revealing the underlying shell.
attribute_stem_attachment: A small, dark, recessed stem scar is visible at one end of the coconut, positioned centrally and surrounded by a lighter, more textured area.
